---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for tabNest
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What are you trying to accomplish that you currently cannot?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible about how it should work from a user perspective.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds? Why is your proposed solution preferable?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references that would help us understand the request.
